This page provides an overview of the statuses of the Houses in Westeros, both at the start of A Game of Thrones, and at the end of the most recent book in the A Song of Ice and Fire series (currently A Dance with Dragons).

Contents

  • 2 North
  • 3 Vale
  • 4 Riverlands
  • 5 Iron Islands
  • 6 Westerlands

  • 8 Stormlands
  • 9 Dorne
